description:
A developer began adding offline-first data caching to the StudyPlanner app using Room persistence and Retrofit networking, but left the work incomplete — the project no longer compiles. Your task is to diagnose all issues, complete the unfinished code, and get the project building successfully.

The partial implementation spans the entire data stack: Gradle build configuration, Room database layer, Retrofit networking layer, the repository’s cache logic, and ViewModel integration. Some code has bugs, some has incomplete implementations, and some dependencies are missing or misconfigured. The complete SubjectDto mapping serves as a reference for the expected coding patterns in the other DTOs.

Fix all compile errors and logic bugs so that ./gradlew assembleDebug succeeds.
